sources.name: LoadDef
published_validation: Green-function comparison with Guo et al. (2004)
M2 ocean-tide-loading displacement comparison with SPOTL

source_audit_observations.scope: upstream main branch inspected through GitHub HTML on 2026-07-12; not a v1.2.2 artifact audit
source_audit_observations.project_consequence: Use a selected gE reference-frame output only for the combined elastic path and compute direct attraction independently; do not add LoadDef gN again. Reverse and test the published normalization before SI conversion.

component_mapping.warning: Do not split LoadDef elastic gravity into deformation and internal-mass terms without verifying its exact gE definition and normalization. The project interface now enforces a combined-output path until such evidence exists.

acceptance_before_scientific_use: record exact release commit and source checksum
freeze Earth model and CE/CM reference frame
map elastic gravity output to project component definitions without double counting
reproduce a published LoadDef Green-function benchmark
preserve GPL obligations while keeping project-generated data provenance distinct
